jp.title: 米原油一時70ドル割れ、3カ月ぶり 足止め船舶がホルムズ相次ぎ脱出

world.title: Magnitude 5.6 earthquake in Northern California, injuries reported
world.description: A magnitude 5.6 earthquake shook Northern California on Wednesday morning, according to the U.S. Geological Survey. Since then, officials have stated that some injuries have been reported.
